text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, May 10. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help troubleshoot that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! I've got the schedule covered. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
